text:
is a pamphlet sold in an online store and before the presentation when the Stage Evangelion Beyond was released. It was created and sold by Bunkamura on 2023 for 2000 yen (Tax included). https://twitter.com/Bunkamura_info/status/1658668797883224064 

Overview

The pamphlet has more information about the production of the stage play, with concept art, photos, interviews and more content related to the production of the project. https://www.bunkamura.co.jp/cocoon/lineup/evangelion2023/topics/7484.html 

Contents

Interviews and roundtable discussions with the performers
Long interview with Sidi Larbi Cherkaoui
Explaining the world of Stage Evangelion Beyond
Production notes of Evangelions and Angels
6 pages of rehearsal photos of the performers 

Staff

Publisher: Bunkamura

References
